generatedPost:
Market disruptions happen roughly every 18 months — yet history suggests investors who stay the course come out stronger. One portfolio manager shares 5 lessons from the pandemic that challenge what most investors think they know. https://www.capitalgroup.com/advisor/insights/articles/5-investment-lessons-pandemic.html
Important disclosures: https://bit.ly/2JzEDWl
judgeNotes: The opening stat ("every 18 months") is grounded in the article and works as an effective hook; the framing around "staying the course" and "5 lessons" accurately reflects the portfolio manager's narrative. Voice, tone, and URL/disclosure placement are all consistent with Capital Group's advisor-track convention.
